item.name: Protected API with invalid token fails
Tax settings without ACCOUNTING_VIEW forbidden for admin

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('productId', r.id); pm.environment.set('productSku', r.sku); pm.environment.set('productBarcode', r.barcode);
pm.test('cgst sgst calculated', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.taxBreakups.length).to.be.at.least(2); });
const r = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('invoiceId', r.id); pm.environment.set('invoiceTotal', r.total);

item.name: Org B cannot see Org A product by id

exec: pm.test('customer accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,201,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('credit account accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,201,400,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('credit validation accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,400,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('supplier accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,201,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('purchase accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,201,400,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('grn accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,201,400,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('sales return accepted or module unavailable', function () { pm.expect([200,201,400,404,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
